title: God’s Knights Open the Abyss
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Robin, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Unknown person #9, Road as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: mixed-race people have existed throughout history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such hybrids are rare and often struggle to thrive on their own, but in every era, there have always been those who are more flexible if you know what I mean.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet Sanji ends up like him when he's older!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, old dude, we're looking for the key to free lol...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must say, you shouldn't just blurt something like that out so casually!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a vindictive old coot! Just keep it to yourself, okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Rumors were made to spread, missy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I told you to quit it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know what kind of man lol is?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one who locked him up before was none other than red-haired shanks...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: until that point, no one was able to stop him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know the kind of power LOKI wields? If there's even a slight chance of him running amok. Have you thought of how many casualties will--

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, the key's not gonna find itself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And this old-timer sounds like he's gonna go on for a while.!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys!! We should take warnings like this more seriously!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My sincerest apologies, sir ya... they're...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the morning, and I was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm sick of all your warnings!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you wanna stop me, you'll hafta use force!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're just pointing out the risk, Roger! You dumbass!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
